title: Flamboyant Cherry Tomato Dumplings
description: A savory and flaky keto-friendly Russian dish featuring cherry tomatoes in a dumpling form that is sure to impress with its vibrant colors and flavors.
instructions: Mix eggs and butter until creamy.
Gradually add flour, mixing until dough forms.
Divide the dough into equal parts, forming each part into a ball.
Place cherry tomatoes in one side of each dumpling ball; sprinkle cheese on top if desired.
Roll out each piece into thin circles, place a tomato on each circle and fold over to enclose the filling.
Place stuffed dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
Serve warm as an appetizer or snack.
